scripts.build:itch: turbo build:itch && (cd apps/web/out && (rm -rf next || true) && mv _next next && find . -type f \( -name "*.html" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.css" -o -name "*.json" \) -exec sed -i '' 's|/_next/|next/|g' {} + && find . -type f -name "*.css" -exec sed -i '' 's|next/static/|../../next/static/|g' {} + && find . -type f -name "*.css" -exec sed -i '' 's|assets/|../../assets/|g' {} + && find . -type f -name "*.css" -exec sed -i '' 's|battle-of-tanks/|../../battle-of-tanks/|g' {} + && find . -type f \( -name "*.html" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.css" \) -exec sed -i '' 's|/assets/|assets/|g' {} + && find . -type f \( -name "*.html" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.css" \) -exec sed -i '' 's|/battle-of-tanks/|battle-of-tanks/|g' {} + && find . -type f \( -name "*.html" -o -name "*.js" \) -exec sed -i '' 's|/logo.png|logo.png|g' {} + && find . -type f \( -name "*.html" -o -name "*.js" \) -exec sed -i '' 's|/manifest.json|manifest.json|g' {} + && find . -type f \( -name "*.html" -o -name "*.js" \) -exec sed -i '' 's|/favicon.ico|favicon.ico|g' {} + && zip -r ../../../itch-tanks.zip .)
